CustomField.formula:
(leaseworks__Estimated_Closing__c - DATE(VALUE(leaseworks__YoM__c), 7, 1))/365.25 /*
365.25 since we are talking about aircraft age */
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This is the age of the aircraft calculated as of the estimated closing date, based on year of manufacture
CustomField.label: Age (Years)
